name: Nutty Mushroom Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon marjoram, thyme, and chopped rosemary each
4 cups cooked rice (brown, white, or wild)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, cook onion, carrots, walnuts, mushrooms, and herbs in butter over medium heat until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
2. Stir in rice and parsley; heat thoroughly.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Enjoy!
